column1: # Trial: Final - Dallas Titans vs Virat CC - GPCC Cup 2025

column3: Dallas Titans vs Virat CC - Final - GPCC Cup 2025 | Played on: 2025-02-07 at Grand Prairie Cricket Ground

We like to thank: | All Stars Cricket Academy for volunteering to make sample bail safety devices for trials | Grand Prairie Cricket Club (GPCC) for conducting the tournament + allowing this trial in a live match + great camera footage | Umpires and players of the 2 teams for their participation and valuable feedback on behavior of the device during the match

This game featured same devices used for the previous game with 1 addition: | A stopper (orange color) below the collar (black color) in addition to the stopper above the collar. | | Reason: to reduce time (a few seconds each time) for umpires to set the bails after every stumping attempt! | It is faster (by a few seconds) to set the device and bails if the collar falls and rests on the stopper than if it falls all the way to the ground | | Other benefits and drawbacks documented in previous game learnings. | | We can use this approach too with awareness of the pros and cons.

Next video shows side view of same dismissal. | Listen to an enjoyable and lighthearted moment by the two commentators who know fully well that this is a free idea open to everyone! | | Commentators and camera crew made this competitive tournament very special. |

column2: keeper's gloves have already displaced the bails
